entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop providing food and nutritional security, susceptible to drought and heat stress.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency that causes yield loss and aflatoxin contamination in peanuts.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of high temperature that causes yield loss and impacts nutritional quality in peanuts.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production, which is reduced by drought and heat stress.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritive value of peanuts, adversely impacted by abiotic stresses.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A contamination occurring in peanuts exposed to drought stress at the reproductive stage.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL AND MOLECULAR BASIS
entities.description: The underlying biological mechanisms of stress tolerance in peanuts.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources used for characterization of stress tolerance.

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with drought tolerance in peanuts.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Specific genes associated with drought tolerance in peanuts.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to initiate abiotic stress adaptation.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand non-living environmental stresses.

entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to add value to peanuts through genetic modification.

entities.name: PHENOMICS
entities.description: The study of phenotypes to collect phenotyping data in large populations.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: Technology used to accelerate the collection of phenotyping data.

entities.name: HOLISTIC BREEDING APPROACH
entities.description: A strategy considering multiple stress-tolerant traits to produce resilient genotypes.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global environmental shift impacting agricultural production worldwide.

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT GENOTYPES
entities.description: Peanut genotypes developed to withstand climate-related stresses with improved quality.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING DATA
entities.description: Data collected from breeding populations using phenomics and AI.
